words.def: the state of affairs that a plan is intended to achieve and that (when achieved) terminates behavior intended to achieve it
words.zh: n. 目標, 目的；進球, 射中次數

words.def: the state of affairs that a plan is intended to achieve and that (when achieved) terminates behavior intended to achieve it
words.zh: n. 目標, 終點, 得分, 球門, 守門員
adv. 也, 並且, 同樣地

words.def: gone by; or in the past
